heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 6992k Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Administrator such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1989 through 1991 for purposes of carrying out activities under this subchapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 11010 and is classified to .section 11011 of Pub. L. 89–272section 6992j of this title
